name: Lobster Thermidor
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil lobsters and remove the meat. Reserve the shells.
2. Sauté the lobster meat and sliced mushrooms in butter for 5 minutes. Add salt and pepper to taste. If using sherry, add it and braise for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Blend flour into the mixture and slowly stir in milk (or cream). Add cheese and stir until melted.
4. Sprinkle with paprika. Remove from heat.
5. Blend in egg yolks.
6. Fill lobster shells with the mixture. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and a dash of paprika.
7. Place under broiler to brown.
